title: Gevarno Loop

{{Quote|The Al'Har system—of which Haruun Kal is the sole planet—lies on the nexus of several hyperspace lanes: the hub of a wheel called the Gevarno Loop, whose spokes join the Separatist systems of Killisu, Jutrand, Loposi, and the Gevarno Cluster with Opari, Ventran, and Ch'manss—all loyalist.|Mace Windu (allegedly), ''[[The Private Journals of Mace Windu]]''|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>}}
The '''Gevarno Loop''' was a circular [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] that connected a number of [[Star system/Legends|systems]], one of the most notables being the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] located in the [[Al'Har system]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

==Systems==
*[[Al'Har system]]<ref name="Shatterpoint" /><ref name="Wizards" />

*[[Jutrand system/Legends|Jutrand system]]<ref name="Shatterpoint" /><ref name="TCSWE-Jutrand system" />

*[[Ventran system/Legends|Ventran system]]<ref name="Shatterpoint" />
